description.value:
An armet-style helm lined with velvet maps of the night sky. It grants +1 to Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see at night.

Curse. On long rests the wearer receives vivid visions of allies plotting betrayal. The visions are false but feel true: after enough rests the wearer has disadvantage on Wisdom saves to resist being swayed by lies about allies, and advantage on Insight checks only when the conclusion is paranoia.

unidentified.description: A heavy helm with star charts inside the visor lining. Night watch feels easier wearing it.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: Enchanted helm that sharpens night vision and star-reading.
cursedMeta.trueNature: False betrayal visions on rests; eventually disadvantage on Wis saves vs lies about allies and distorted Insight toward paranoia.

curse.name: Crooked Constellations
curse.description: After enough long rests the wearer suffers false visions of allies scheming against them. At full activation they have disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws to resist deception about allies.

hints: Constellation lines inside the helm do not match any real sky you have sailed under.

escalation.effect: Odd dreams of side-eyes at the campfire.
Waking certainty that a specific ally 'meant something' by a harmless phrase.
